items.title: S01E02 - In Search of Mira
items.summary: Bennu befriends a farming family after he witnesses a drug-related murder and must seek refuge.

infolabels.title: In Search of Mira
infolabels.plot: Bennu befriends a farming family after he witnesses a drug-related murder and must seek refuge.

items.title: S01E03 - One of Them
items.summary: Preminger is close on the heels of Bennu. The ancient astronaut believes Mira is his long-lost wife is still in suspended animation in an Indian Burial Site.

infolabels.title: One of Them
infolabels.plot: Preminger is close on the heels of Bennu. The ancient astronaut believes Mira is his long-lost wife is still in suspended animation in an Indian Burial Site.

items.title: S01E04 - A Presence of Evil
items.summary: Terrorists that are plotting to transport stolen uranium threaten Bennu and a family who runs the horse stables where Bennu is working.

infolabels.title: A Presence of Evil
infolabels.plot: Terrorists that are plotting to transport stolen uranium threaten Bennu and a family who runs the horse stables where Bennu is working.

items.title: S01E05 - The Fire Within
items.summary: Seeking Mira's burial site at a state park, Bennu gets a job at a construction site. He learns that the boss may be a victim of a swindle.

infolabels.title: The Fire Within
